title: Integrations for Communihub Emails/ Non Item Related Activity
excerpt: I want to be able to change a status of an Item when an email is sent from the connected Gmail account, and for these emails sent to also be logged in the Activities board automatically (either when an email is sent via …

posts.author: Katie_SQUID (Katie F)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to change a status of an Item when an email is sent from the connected Gmail account, and for these emails sent to also be logged in the Activities board automatically (either when an email is sent via the Communihub app or when our @crm.monday.com email is BCC’d). There is no Communihub integration for this - only when an email is received by or opened by the recipient in the email column. We consider sending an email as a sales activity in our company so it very annoying that our sales team will need to manually log all emails they send as Events rather than just syncing their Gmail account. Is there any workarounds for this or is this a feature in the pipeline?
